name: Watercress and Ginger Salad
recipeIngredient: Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lime juice, grated ginger, and mustard.
2. Add the chopped watercress and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
3. Toss until well combined.
4. Serve 2 to 3 people.
Palm Beach Post 08/18//97
